chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 46 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.03.2025 For orders on MA 1708/25 For orders on MA 1709/25 Mr. Abdul JabbarCharan, Advocate along with Applicant 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned Counsel for the applicant on instructions of applicant does not press this Cr. Misc. Application No. 46 of 2025 which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
